messages.content: You are a biomedical AI specialized in aging biology, trained on genomic, proteomic, and clinical data.

Compare these two patient profiles for 10-year mortality risk.

Options: A. Profile A  B. Profile B

Profile A:
Demographics: 63-year-old male of non-Hispanic white ethnicity.
Body measurements: BMI 27.4 kg/m2, waist circumference 98.0 cm, diastolic BP 78.0 mm Hg, systolic BP 128.0 mm Hg, pulse 70.0 bpm.
Blood test results: Albumin 44.0 g/L; Total cholesterol 198.0 mg/dL; HDL 52.0 mg/dL; Glycohemoglobin 5.6%; C-reactive protein 0.20 mg/dL; Creatinine 78.0 umol/L; White blood cell count 6.2 1000 cells/uL.
Current medications: None.
Questionnaire: Never smoker. Engages in moderate weekly activity.

Profile B: the same patient, except: current smoker (≈1 pack/day).

Which profile has the HIGHER 10-year mortality risk? Answer with the option letter.
B
